summary: Soundboard recording of a solid Spring‑1988 show that many fans still love
review: The two fan reviews are brief but positive overall – one calls the concert an all‑time favorite from the “bomb” spring of ’88, while the other simply describes it as a solid show. No specific recording flaws are mentioned, and the .sbd tag suggests a decent soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: One enthusiastic 5‑star review and one neutral 3‑star review give an average of 4 stars; assumed good soundboard quality pushes the rating slightly above average.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on any audio problems, implying a clean and acceptable soundboard capture.
